issues.description: Text says 'during this turn' which indicates DuringYourTurn, not EndOfTurn. Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' to match the temporary nature of the boost within the turn scope.
Target missing 'hasType' condition for red Characters. DSL only specifies maxCost:1 but effect text requires 'red Characters', which should be enforced via hasType:'Red' or similar condition filter.
